_comment: Maps Retell phone numbers to QuickChat business IDs. The business_id must match the name used in ChromaDB collections (e.g., 'Sawan Indian Cuisine' -> collection 'business__sawan_indian_cuisine').

+11234567890.greeting: Thank you for calling Active Body Fitness! How can I help you today?

+10987654321.greeting: Thank you for calling Sawan Indian Cuisine! How can I help you today?

+11122334455.greeting: Thank you for calling White Tiger Martial Arts! How can I help you today?

default_greeting: Thank you for calling! How can I help you today?
